steps.label: index a document
steps.cmd:
curl -s -XPUT "http://localhost:9200/articles/_doc/1" \
  -H 'content-type: application/json' \
  -d '{"title":"Hello Xerj","body":"one binary for search","views":42,"tag":"intro"}'
